Book Scoping Review
Uncompromising Due Diligence

Delivered by Our Leadership Team Over Two Decades.

We brought national-infrastructure delivery discipline to the UK for a simple reason: the market is full of products, but short on accountable delivery. Below is the verifiable project track record of our executive engineering team.

LEGAL & PROCUREMENT DISCLAIMER: National-infrastructure projects listed below (such as Wankhede Stadium, Ahmedabad Airport, and BARC) were delivered by members of Drievu’s leadership team over the past two decades in prior executive roles. Drievu Limited was incorporated in the UK in 2024 (Company No. 15479482). UK deployments are tagged explicitly as live Drievu contracts.

Staines Road Commercial Estate

London, United Kingdom

31 smart security cameras and high-capacity on-site video recording installed across the commercial estate. Delivered on schedule with zero disruption to active tenants and a complete handover document pack.
